CurrentIssues.ID: AlsoCouldBeApply:DownloadWorkerLogicTest.kt$DownloadWorkerLogicTest$also
CognitiveComplexMethod:AdminCollectionDetailViewModel.kt$AdminCollectionDetailViewModel$private fun loadCollection()

CognitiveComplexMethod:BookCard.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun BookCard( bookId: String, title: String, coverPath: String?, blurHash: String?, onClick: () -> Unit, authorName: String? = null, duration: String? = null, subtitle: String? = null, progress: Float? = null, timeRemaining: String? = null, isFinished: Boolean = false, avatarOverlay: AvatarOverlayData? = null, isInSelectionMode: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, onLongPress: (() -> Unit)? = null, cardWidth: Dp? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

CognitiveComplexMethod:BookCoverImage.kt$@Composable fun BookCoverImage( bookId: String, coverPath: String?, contentDescription: String?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, blurHash: String? = null, contentScale: ContentScale = ContentScale.Crop, onState: ((AsyncImagePainter.State) -> Unit)? = null, )
CognitiveComplexMethod:ContributorPuller.kt$ContributorPuller$override suspend fun pull( updatedAfter: String?, onProgress: (SyncStatus) -> Unit, ): AppResult<Unit>
CognitiveComplexMethod:Id3v2Reader.kt$Id3v2Reader$fun read(bytes: ByteArray): Id3v2ReadResult?
CognitiveComplexMethod:SyncManager.kt$SyncManager$private fun handleScanCompleted(scanInfo: ScanCompletedInfo)
ComplexCondition:AudioFormatDetector.kt$AudioFormatDetector$headerBytes[0] == 0x4F.toByte() && headerBytes[1] == 0x67.toByte() && headerBytes[2] == 0x67.toByte() && headerBytes[3] == 0x53.toByte()
ComplexCondition:AudioFormatDetector.kt$AudioFormatDetector$headerBytes[0] == 0x66.toByte() && headerBytes[1] == 0x4C.toByte() && headerBytes[2] == 0x61.toByte() && headerBytes[3] == 0x43.toByte()
ComplexCondition:AudioFormatDetector.kt$AudioFormatDetector$headerBytes[4] == 0x66.toByte() && headerBytes[5] == 0x74.toByte() && headerBytes[6] == 0x79.toByte() && headerBytes[7] == 0x70.toByte()
ComplexCondition:BookPuller.kt$BookPuller$colors != null && book.dominantColor == null && book.darkMutedColor == null && book.vibrantColor == null
ComplexCondition:BuildMp4File.kt$MoovBuilder$patched[i] == stcoMarker[0] && patched[i + 1] == stcoMarker[1] && patched[i + 2] == stcoMarker[2] && patched[i + 3] == stcoMarker[3]

CyclomaticComplexMethod:BookCard.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun BookCard( bookId: String, title: String, coverPath: String?, blurHash: String?, onClick: () -> Unit, authorName: String? = null, duration: String? = null, subtitle: String? = null, progress: Float? = null, timeRemaining: String? = null, isFinished: Boolean = false, avatarOverlay: AvatarOverlayData? = null, isInSelectionMode: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, onLongPress: (() -> Unit)? = null, cardWidth: Dp? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

TooManyFunctions:Koin.ios.kt$KoinHelper : KoinComponent
UnnecessaryParentheses:AtomWalker.kt$AtomWalker$(end - offset)
UnnecessaryParentheses:AtomWalker.kt$AtomWalker$(length - offset)
UnnecessaryParentheses:AudioFormatDetector.kt$AudioFormatDetector$(headerBytes[1].toInt() and mp3SyncMaskHi)
UnnecessaryParentheses:AuroraBackground.kt$((b - r) / d + 2f)
UnnecessaryParentheses:AuroraBackground.kt$((g - b) / d + (if (g < b) 6f else 0f))
UnnecessaryParentheses:AuroraBackground.kt$((r - g) / d + 4f)
UnnecessaryParentheses:AuroraBackground.kt$(if (g < b) 6f else 0f)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BinaryDecoder.kt$(BITS_PER_BYTE * 2)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BinaryDecoder.kt$(BITS_PER_SYNC_SAFE_BYTE * 2)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BinaryDecoder.kt$(BITS_PER_SYNC_SAFE_BYTE * 3)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BinaryDecoder.kt$(raw[0].toInt() and BYTE_MASK)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BinaryDecoder.kt$(raw[1].toInt() and BYTE_MASK)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BuildMp3File.kt$Mp3Builder$(144 * bitrate)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BuildMp4File.kt$MoovBuilder$(ch.startMs + 1)
UnnecessaryParentheses:BuildMp4File.kt$MoovBuilder$(deltaMs * timescale)
UnnecessaryParentheses:Id3v2Reader.kt$Id3v2Reader$(flags and 0x40)
UnnecessaryParentheses:Mp4ChapterExtractor.kt$Mp4ChapterExtractor$(cursorTimescaleUnits * 1000L)
UnnecessaryParentheses:Mp4ChapterExtractor.kt$Mp4ChapterExtractor$(start100ns / 10_000)
UnnecessaryParentheses:Mp4Parser.kt$Mp4Parser$(durationUnits * 1000L)
UnnecessaryParentheses:Mp4ParserPropertyTest.kt$Mp4ParserPropertyTest$(du * 1000L)
UnnecessaryParentheses:MpegDurationCalculator.kt$MpegDurationCalculator$(bytes[i + 1].toInt() and 0xE0)

UnusedPrivateProperty:JvmSecureStorageTest.kt$JvmSecureStorageTest$val content1 = file1.readText()
UnusedPrivateProperty:JvmSecureStorageTest.kt$JvmSecureStorageTest$val content2 = file2.readText()
UnusedPrivateProperty:Mp4ChapterExtractor.kt$Mp4ChapterExtractor$j
UnusedPrivateProperty:ShelfCard.kt$private const val HEX_RADIX = 16
UnusedPrivateProperty:ShelfCard.kt$private const val MAX_RGB_LENGTH = 6
UseIfInsteadOfWhen:DockedNowPlayingBar.kt$when { hours > 0 -> "${hours}h ${minutes}m left" else -> "${minutes}m left" }

UseIfInsteadOfWhen:JvmStoragePaths.kt$JvmStoragePaths$when { "windows" in os -> { val appData = System.getenv("APPDATA") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/AppData/Roaming" File(appData, "ListenUp") } else -> { // Linux and others: XDG Base Directory Specification val xdgData = System.getenv("XDG_DATA_HOME") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/.local/share" File(xdgData, "listenup") } }

UseIfInsteadOfWhen:JvmStoragePaths.kt$JvmStoragePaths$when { "windows" in os -> { val localAppData = System.getenv("LOCALAPPDATA") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/AppData/Local" File(localAppData, "ListenUp/cache") } else -> { val xdgCache = System.getenv("XDG_CACHE_HOME") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/.cache" File(xdgCache, "listenup") } }
UseLet:AdminRepositoryImpl.kt$AdminRepositoryImpl$if (canShare != null) { UpdatePermissionsRequest( canShare = canShare, ) } else { null }
UseLet:BookCoverImage.kt$if (coverPath != null) { ImageRequest .Builder(context) .data(coverPath) .memoryCacheKey("$bookId:cover") .diskCacheKey("$bookId:cover") .build() } else { null }
